'''Wesson DeLameter''' was [[Hamnet]]'s [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] and was always well-dressed and quiet. He accompanied Hamnet on board the ''[[Ananuru Express]]'' when the [[RNA brainwashing virus]] was up for auction.
